name: How long until AI starts recommending my law firm after getting awards?
description: 1-6 months with PR push; monitor AI weekly.[1]

mainEntity.name: How long until AI starts recommending my law firm after getting awards?

acceptedAnswer.text: 1-6 months with PR push; monitor AI weekly.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: **1-6 months, depending on award prominence and PR amplification across sources.** AI indexes patterns gradually as new recognitions propagate to directories and media. Major listings like Chambers update annually but boost fast. **Key factors:** 1) Award verification speed; 2) PR distribution; 3) Query competition; 4) Multi-platform consistency. Announce wins via PR, update profiles immediately, and monitor AI responses bi-weekly. Delays occur without reinforcement.[1][2]
